capture.title: Capture or upload audio
capture.body: Record from your microphone (or Windows system audio in the desktop app), or upload existing audio files. Everything is transcribed and diarized automatically.

recordings.title: Your recordings
recordings.body: Recordings appear here as they finish. Organise them into sections, drag to reorder, and drop audio files anywhere on this panel to upload.

detail.title: Transcript & speakers
detail.body: Open a recording to read its speaker-labelled, timestamped transcript. Rename speakers, identify known people, edit, summarise, and play back.

chat.title: Chat across transcripts
chat.body: Ask questions across one or more transcripts with an AI assistant. Open this panel from its rail on the right.

account.title: Settings & more
account.body: Configure your AI endpoint, manage enrolled speakers (People), check your storage, and replay this tour any time from here.
